name: BDG Corduroy Bomber Jacket
description: BDG Jeans corduroy zip-up bomber jacket in tan/khaki. Wide-wale corduroy fabric, full-length front zipper, spread collar, elasticized waistband and cuffs, side pockets. Relaxed oversized fit.

name: BPM Hoodie
description: BPM oversized hoodie in black. Heavyweight fleece, raglan sleeves, front kangaroo pocket, lined hood with drawcord, small BPM chest logo. Relaxed oversized fit.
